Timeline About Contact

About

Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years building and operating backend systems. I share how real systems behave, AI in practice, and the engineering and product judgment behind good decisions.

What I Do

I build reliable services with clear contracts, strong observability, and practical tooling. My focus is production systems: how they work, how they fail, and how to debug them.

Engineering Areas

  • APIs & services — contracts, performance, migrations
  • Data & search — PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Elasticsearch
  • Reliability & observability — SLOs, metrics, logs, traces
  • Developer tooling — automation, developer experience, CI

Current Stack

Languages: Ruby, Go, Java, Python

Infrastructure & data: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Elasticsearch, Redis, Aerospike, Kafka, Kubernetes

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, OpenTelemetry

Public Work

Writing: I've written for SigNoz, Geekflare, and Medium about monitoring, backend architecture, and production systems.

Projects:

  • letter — Go tool for updating Postman collections from locally saved files
  • bytecase — collection of useful code snippets and scripts

Engineering Principles

  • Clarity over cleverness
  • Measure impact and make it observable
  • Design for on-call: account for idempotency, backpressure, and timeouts
  • Prefer small, reversible steps
  • Prefer boring technology that scales
  • Prefer fast feedback loops
  • Prefer documents that age well

Recognition

  • Above and Beyond, Q1 FY 2022-2023, Snapdeal
  • Customer Champion, Q3 FY 2022-2023, Snapdeal
  • Fantabulous Award, 2020-2021, NRI Financial Technologies
  • Shining Star Award, Q2 2019-2020 & Q2 2020-2021, NRI Financial Technologies
